scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e:local && npm run test:e2e:firebase
scripts.test:e2e:firebase: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-when-should-we-meet "playwright test --config playwright.firebase.config.ts"
scripts.test:e2e:firebase:headed: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-when-should-we-meet "playwright test --config playwright.firebase.config.ts --headed"
